title: Per-Builder Delivery Profile Execution
why_now: This slice defined 8 fingerprint dimensions and archetype hypotheses. Executing GROUP BY queries on delivery data (builder pubkey → block count, relay distribution, value stats, gas utilization) would produce exact per-builder profiles replacing estimated ranges.

title: Same-Date Bid-Delivery Builder Matching
why_now: This slice identified the 18-month date mismatch between bid trace (2024) and delivery (2026) as the primary limitation for cross-source fingerprinting. Obtaining same-date data would enable definitive bid-to-delivery fingerprint correlation per builder.

title: Builder MEV Composition Attribution
why_now: This slice fingerprints builders by block-construction traits but not by MEV content. Joining builder delivery data with canonical execution traces and the MEV taxonomy would reveal whether different builder archetypes specialize in different MEV types.
